label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a partner at the start. The question is about tracking their partner changes through a series of switches, and then determining who Bob is dancing with at the end. First, I need to list out the initial pairings. The problem says: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Karl - Claire is with Patrick - Dave is with Sam - Eve is with Helga So the partners are: Alice - Lola Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Dave - Sam Eve - Helga Now, there are several exchanges (switches) of partners. Let's go through each one step by step. First switch: Dave and Alice switch partners. So Dave was with Sam, and Alice was with Lola. After switching, Dave will be with Lola, and Alice will be with Sam. Let me write down after this switch: Alice - Sam Dave - Lola Others remain as before: Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Eve - Helga Second switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. So Eve was with Helga, Alice is now with Sam. After switching, Eve will be with Sam, and Alice will be with Helga. After this switch: Alice - Helga Eve - Sam Others: Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Dave - Lola Third switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob was with Karl, Dave was with Lola. So after switching, Bob will be with Lola, and Dave will be with Karl. After this: Bob - Lola Dave - Karl Others: Alice - Helga Claire - Patrick Eve -
